scope.dependency_radius: Sub-agent overview docs and indexes only; update dependent links if split creates a new doc.
constraints: Active canonical routing should be separated from roadmap, TODO, and retired compatibility notes.
Do not remove useful historical context without relocating or labeling it.
non_goals: Do not create the future reconciler sub-agent unless separately requested.

review_findings: .ai/SUB-AGENT-SYSTEM.MD mixes active routing with retired .ai/assets/commands notes and future reconciler-sub-agent TODO.

steps: Mark active routing sections and roadmap/legacy sections.
Move roadmap/legacy material to a clearly labeled guide or workflow note if it must be preserved.
Keep .ai/SUB-AGENT-SYSTEM.MD focused on active routing and artifact rules.
Update references to any newly split document.
deferred_items: Actual creation of reconciler-sub-agent remains out of scope unless a separate workflow approves it.
